## Return Value

The image manager.

# default()

**Type Method**

Returns the shared image manager object.

## Declaration

```swift
class func `default`() -> PHImageManager
```

## Return Value

The image manager.

## Discussion

This method always returns the same image manager object, which is shared for all uses in your app.
title: default()
